principal: AgentCore workload identity for each deployed agent role
delegated_actor: End-user identity associated with the workload access context
credential_strategy: Workload access token authorizes retrieval from a credential provider backed by the token vault
audience_binding: Inbound JWT authorizer plus resource and provider-specific authorization
revocation: Disable or remove workload/provider authorization and revoke the upstream provider grant
audit: Correlate AWS identity events with application task_id, actor_id, agent identity ARN, and audit_id
limitations: AgentCore objects are provider-specific and are not interchangeable with the local JWT schema
Application policy must still enforce task purpose, tenant data access, and tool selection
